title: INSEE - Emploi, chomage, population active

downloads.description: Chomage et taux de chomage au sens du BIT selon le plus haut diplome obtenu, par sexe et age regroupe, en moyenne annuelle.

access_conditions: Public download available from INSEE publication pages.
Localized unemployment data are also documented as available via api.insee.fr SDMX service.
limitations: The exact SDMX export URL for the localized territorial series was not pinned down in this turn.
This manifest records a raw education-related unemployment table, not the full grouped family of INSEE labour-market series.
